source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A photon scatters off a free electron at A as shown in figure, producing a second photon. This photon then scatters off another free electron at B, producing a third photon. Determine the value of \( \Delta \lambda).

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says 'as shown in the figure'
the needed scattering geometry/angles are not specified in text and likely come from the image
multi_step: the problem describes two sequential scattering events, at A and then at B
solving likely requires combining wavelength shifts from both scatterings rather than a single direct lookup
the figure-based geometry must likely be interpreted before applying the physics relation
verifiability: answer_text is a specific numeric value with units
multiple-choice options are provided, enabling straightforward answer checking
the underlying physics computation is rule-based and can be independently verified from the figure and formula

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和主图像资产均存在，registry_passed=true，核心语义支撑完整
图像依赖高但对应图像文件可用，因此“figure_details_not_in_text”不构成致命缺口
答案为可核验的具体短文本结果，且题目基于规则计算，具备较好的验证性
